## Pull Request

### Summary
Please describe the purpose of this PR and the user-facing change it contains.

### Changes
- What changed
- Why it changed
- How it was verified

### Checklist
- [ ] Code changes are covered by tests when appropriate
- [ ] Documentation has been updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] The package metadata is correct for installable builds
- [ ] No generated or sensitive files are committed
- [ ] This PR is ready for review

### Notes
- The repository uses `master` as the mainline branch.
- Workflow names: `Python Tests`, `Build package`, `Publish docs`, `Release Please`.
- If AI assistance was used, describe the role of the AI and any verification performed.
